title: Various Items of Information
description: In this year, al-Rashid wrote to 'Ali b. 'Isa b. Mahin, who was at that time (governor) in Khurisan, to come to him. The reason for his despatch to 'Ali with these instructions was that a rumor had been brought to his notice and he had been informed that 'Ali had determined upon an act of rebelliousness. So 'Ali b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
